nasb.text: But Moses said to the sons of Gad and to the sons of Reuben, “Shall your brothers go to war while you yourselves sit here?

esv.text: But Moses said to the people of Gad and to the people of Reuben, “Shall your brothers go to the war while you sit here?

cnv.text: 摩西對迦得子孫和流本子孫說：“難道你們的兄弟去打仗，你們卻坐在這裡嗎？

ccb.text: 摩西对他们说：“难道你们要坐在这里，让其他同胞去打仗吗？
